content.title: GalaxyOne Head Wants Retail Investors to Stake More, Predict Less
content.summary: Zac Prince, head of Galaxy’s retail platform, said he struggles to see prediction markets in diversified portfolios for long-term investors.

content.title: What Is Q-Day? The Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Explained
content.summary: Experts warn quantum computers could someday forge Bitcoin’s digital signatures, allowing unauthorized transactions.

content.title: OpenAI's New AI Model Rosalind Could Shave Years Off Drug Discovery. You Probably Can't Use It
content.summary: GPT-Rosalind is OpenAI's first domain-specific model, built for drug discovery and life sciences—and it's not for everyone.

content.title: Bitcoin Cracks 7-Month Ceiling. Can Bulls Push It Higher?
content.summary: The price of Bitcoin breaks a seven-month downtrend as geopolitical shifts and prediction markets point to $84K next.

content.title: You Can Now Use XRP on Solana—Here's How
content.summary: More than $1.2 million worth of wrapped XRP tokens (wXRP) have been minted on Solana as the Ripple-linked asset gains greater DeFi utility.

content.title: Rep. Sheri Biggs Doubles Down on Bitcoin, Buys Up to $250K of BlackRock's ETF
content.summary: Rep. Sheri Biggs purchased up to $250,000 worth of BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF last month, padding a position she entered into last July.

content.title: Sam Altman's World Teams With Zoom, Tinder to Better Verify Humans in the AI Age
content.summary: Iris-scanning crypto project World expands with Tinder's U.S. human verification rollout and Zoom's Deep Face feature.

content.title: Elizabeth Warren Accuses SEC Chair Paul Atkins of Potentially Lying to Congress
content.summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren said Paul Atkins may have intentionally misled Congress by pushing back over the SEC's dwindling enforcement actions.

content.title: Crypto Trader Turns $2,500 Into $500K on Skyrocketing Ethereum Meme Coin
content.summary: A meme coin trader turned $2,500 into nearly $500,000 in a matter of hours via the Elon Musk-linked ASTEROID token on Ethereum.

content.title: Anthropic’s Alarming Mythos Findings Replicated With Off-the-Shelf AI, Researchers Say
content.summary: Security researchers used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 in an open-source harness to reproduce Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings for under $30 per scan.
